de.uka.ilkd.key.smt.model

Class ObjectVal

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.smt.model.ObjectVal

  • public class ObjectVal
extends java.lang.Object
    Represents an object inside a heap.

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor and Description
      ObjectVal(java.lang.String name)
      creates a new object value of the given name
